message: Payment service is down, checkout is failing for all users. Raised ticket 101.
Confirmed - payment gateway is timing out. Looking into it now.
prod-server-3 CPU is at 94%, opened monitoring ticket.
SSO login bug has been patched and deployed to prod.
Email notifications are queuing up, delay is 35+ minutes. Users are complaining.
Database replica connection issue is fixed. Primary is stable.
Payment gateway still throwing 504s. Looks like tickets 101 and 106 are the same issue.
Network team sees latency spike on eu-west. Investigating BGP route change.
Server memory alert on prod-server-3 and prod-server-5. Could be related to the CPU spike.
CRITICAL: database primary node is not responding. Failover initiated.
